response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) which directly aligns with the role. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), demonstrated testing/TDD discipline, and architecture experience across web, mobile, and embedded. Gaps include limited explicit Nest.js and React depth in recent roles, and no mention of PostgreSQL or Kubernetes production experience at scale, but the breadth and craftsmanship signals strongly justify an interview.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack with recent TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent/MCP work directly matching the role
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, authored testing libraries and workshops)
Polyglot engineer with backend, frontend, DevOps (Docker, GitLab CI), and architecture experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience and limited recent React depth shown in role descriptions
PostgreSQL and Kubernetes/cloud production experience not clearly demonstrated (MongoDB and AWS CDK mentioned instead)
Significant investment in DLang/niche stacks may indicate preference divergence from the primary Nest.js/Vitest stack

key_factors.factor: Seniority and breadth far exceeding 6+ years requirement
Missing explicit Nest.js and limited React depth
